a:["$","$L7",null,{"code":"# Default hybrid search\nresults = mem.recall(\"What database does the project use?\")\n\n# Custom weights\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"What database does the project use?\",\n  vector_weight=0.3,   # Prefer exact text matches\n  text_weight=0.6,\n  temporal_weight=0.1,\n)\n\n# With filters\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"database migration\",\n  tags=[\"backend\", \"infrastructure\"],\n  since=\"2026-04-01\",\n  top_k=5,\n)\n","language":"python"}]
